clues: Remote employees report that they cannot print to local USB printers while connected to the VPN.
File shares that are on the local home network are also not accessible during the VPN session.
All traffic, including local network destinations, is routed through the corporate VPN tunnel.
The VPN was recently reconfigured to improve security after a policy review.
The VPN configuration is set to 'full tunnel' mode instead of 'split tunnel'.
